arts.ttl: We simulated Sporting CP vs Arsenal to get a Champions League score prediction
arts.sum: We predict that Arsenal could set up in a 4-3-3 formation, with their line-up as follows: Raya; Timber, Saliba, Gabriel, Calafiori; Partey, Rice, Odegaard; Saka, Havertz, Martinelli. Arsenal almost got off to the perfect start in Portugal when a short corner routine saw the ball played to Partey on the edge of the box, but unlike at the weekend, he couldn't find the net as his long-range effort rattled the post.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal battling Newcastle United for transfer of in-form Premier League attacker
arts.sum: Arsenal and Newcastle United are among the transfer suitors for Brentford forward Bryan Mbeumo ahead of January, CaughtOffside understands. The Cameroon international has been in superb form in the Premier League this season, and sources with a close understanding of his situation have informed CaughtOffside that Arsenal and Newcastle are interested in him. arts.ttl: Arsenal ready to activate €60m release clause for January signing
arts.sum: Arsenal are prepared to activate Martin Zubimendi's €60 million release clause in order to sign the Real Sociedad midfielder in January. The Real Sociedad star decided to snub Liverpool this summer despite initially looking set to depart his boyhood club.

arts.ttl: Can Gyokeres match Messi's record season?
arts.sum: Viktor Gyokeres is on target to break Lionel Messi's record-breaking goalscoring season. But can he do it?

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Rice fitness, Tierney return and Viktor Gyokeres
arts.sum: I think we have made the right steps and, looking back with the way we played against Inter, which is a team that has been so dominant in their league, reached the final of the Champions League which they should have won. The Gunners go into the game looking to secure their first away win of this Champions League campaign, and just a second European victory on the road in nine matches.

arts.ttl: Viktor Gyokeres: Why Arsenal and Manchester United want goal machine who ‘could reach Haaland level’
arts.sum: Sporting star faces Arsenal as one of the most feared strikers in Europe after an incredible rise that could earn him ‘destiny’ move to the Premier League

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Arsenal & Liverpool ready to bid £50m for star as he’s cleared for January transfer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Liverpool are both ready to try offering around £50million for the potential January transfer of Real Sociedad midfielder Martin Zubimendi. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that Real Sociedad are now ready to listen to offers for Zubimendi this January, though the Spain international’s asking price is likely […] The post Exclusive: Arsenal & Liverpool ready to bid £50m for star as he’s cleared for January transfer appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Tottenham in five-way battle as transfer admission made
arts.sum: Arsenal and Tottenham are one of five clubs showing an interest in young Hammarby winger Bazoumana Toure, according to reports. According to Sky Sports Germany’s Florian Plettenberg, one player to keep an eye on will be Toure.

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Transfer Talk Update: Liam Delap, Viktor Gyokeres, Alexander Isak
